message:
type: PROPOSE
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
note: Adding get_image_mimetype() lazy accessor method to ImageBlock class in types.py

type: PROPOSE
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
note: I'm extracting normalize_image_bytes helper in types.py for image normalization. What's your feature/files?

type: REVISE
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
your_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
note: We both need types.py (mine: add ImageBlock.get_image_mimetype() lazy accessor method; yours: normalize_image_bytes helper). Since it's the same file, let's serialize instead of parallel edits: I'll make my small additive change first (new method, minimal surface area, shouldn't conflict with a helper extraction), then send DONE. You then apply your refactor on top of my changes. Sound good?

type: REVISE
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
your_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
note: We both need types.py (unavoidable, same file). Let's scope by section instead: I will ONLY touch the module-level area (add a new top-level normalize_image_bytes(image_bytes) helper function placed just above the ImageBlock class) and the body of the image_to_base64 validator method (lines ~67-84 currently). I will NOT touch resolve_image or anything else in the class. Please add your get_image_mimetype() as a new method elsewhere in ImageBlock (e.g. after resolve_image), and avoid editing image_to_base64's body or adding code above the ImageBlock class. Whoever finishes first, ping DONE with a summary of exact lines changed so the other can rebase cleanly before writing patch.txt. OK?

type: ACCEPT
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
your_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
note: Agreed - serialize. You go first with get_image_mimetype(), send DONE when finished, then I'll apply my normalize_image_bytes refactor on top. Waiting for your DONE now.

type: REVISE
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
your_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
note: One snag: my feature explicitly requires decoupling mimetype guessing out of image_to_base64's body too (lines ~78-80, the 'if not self.image_mimetype: guess = filetype.guess(...)' block) - I'll replace that block with a call to self.get_image_mimetype(). I will NOT touch line 82 (the base64.b64encode assignment) or anything above the ImageBlock class - that's all yours. I'll add get_image_mimetype() as a new method placed after resolve_image (after line 109). So: you own the top-level helper + line 82; I own lines 78-80 + a new method after line 109. Whoever finishes first pings DONE with the exact diff so the other rebases before writing patch.txt. Agreed?

type: ACCEPT
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
your_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
note: Confirmed. Proceeding now with get_image_mimetype() (lines 78-80 + new method after resolve_image). Will ping DONE shortly.

type: REVISE
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
your_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
note: Conflict: my task explicitly requires refactoring image_to_base64's full body (including the mimetype-guess block) to call normalize_image_bytes() and guess against the returned decoded_for_guessing bytes instead of raw self.image (fixes double-encoding when input is already base64). So lines 75-84 (the whole validator body) need to be mine, not split at 78-80. Proposal: you add get_image_mimetype() purely as a new, independent method after resolve_image (not called from image_to_base64 at all) - it can stand alone for other callers. I'll keep image_to_base64 doing its own inline filetype.guess(decoded_for_guessing) using my helper. That keeps zero line overlap: you touch only the new method block after line 109; I touch only the top-level helper + the image_to_base64 body (lines ~67-84). If you'd rather have image_to_base64 call your accessor, go ahead and finish your method first, tell me its exact signature, and I'll wire one call to it in my refactor - but the surrounding validator logic stays mine either way. Which do you prefer?

type: REVISE
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
your_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
note: Just to be unambiguous before either of us edits: please confirm you will make ZERO changes to lines 67-84 (the whole image_to_base64 method, including the current lines 78-80 mimetype-guess block) - that entire method body is mine to refactor. Your get_image_mimetype() should be added ONLY as a new, separate method placed after resolve_image (after current line 109), not called from image_to_base64. Please reply ACCEPT explicitly agreeing to 'zero edits to lines 67-84' before you start editing, since your last message still mentioned touching lines 78-80.

type: DONE
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
note: Finished. Diff summary: (1) replaced the inline 'if not self.image_mimetype: guess = filetype.guess(...)' block (old lines 78-80) inside image_to_base64 with a single call 'self.get_image_mimetype()' - line 82 (self.image = base64.b64encode(self.image)) is untouched, still right after. (2) Added new method get_image_mimetype(self) -> str | None right after resolve_image (before the blank lines preceding 'ContentBlock = Annotated[...'). Nothing above the ImageBlock class touched. Tests pass (tests/base/llms/test_types.py, 12 passed). All yours now for normalize_image_bytes.

type: DONE
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
note: Cross-posted messages - I already finished and sent DONE before your two REVISE messages arrived (you'd agreed to serialize: 'you go first, then I'll apply my refactor on top'). Current state of image_to_base64 body (lines ~67-84): unchanged except lines 78-80 now read a single line 'self.get_image_mimetype()' instead of the old inline guess block; line 82 (base64.b64encode) is untouched. get_image_mimetype() is added as a new standalone method after resolve_image. Please rebase your normalize_image_bytes refactor on top of this - feel free to change the call inside image_to_base64 however your fix needs (e.g. call get_image_mimetype() with different args, or restructure around it), as long as get_image_mimetype() itself stays intact as the reusable accessor. Go ahead and edit now.

type: DONE
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
note: Finished normalize_image_bytes helper (module-level function above ImageBlock, imports binascii) + refactored image_to_base64 body (lines ~85-104) to use it. Touched: new function after TextBlock class; inside image_to_base64: encoded_image, decoded_for_guessing = normalize_image_bytes(self.image); guess = filetype.guess(decoded_for_guessing); self.image = encoded_image. Did NOT touch resolve_image or anything after line 104. Tests pass (12 passed). All yours if you need anything else in this file.
